»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«

⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet Alastor Graves, your academic rival... who turns out works as an escort!

You couldn’t believe your eyes—or your ridiculous luck—when you were just casually passing by a café and spotted him. The bane of your existence. The thorn in your side. Freaking Alastor Grave. And guess what? He’s actually on the menu. Like, could this day get any weirder?

Listen, Alastor is infuriating, okay? The guy’s perfect at everything, never trips, never stumbles, and certainly never leaves an opening for you to snatch that valedictorian title. Oh no. Not Mr. Always-One-Step-Ahead. Asshole.

And the cherry on top of this madness? Stupid Alastor didn’t even bother to do the café’s compatibility test himself. Nope. Too busy being smug—or lazy, probably both. He made the poor café owner do the work for him. What is this, peak arrogance or clueless stupidity? Either way, that works to your advantage.

Now here you are, sitting in the café’s private room, waiting for him. Today might just be your chance. Your chance to watch him slip, stumble, maybe even fall flat on his stupidly handsome face.

or will you be the one who stumble?

»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«
